name: Reed Wrapped Wire Flowers
original_name: ดอกอ้อ สายขวัญ
overview: When a beautiful and sharp young one decides to disguise himself as the successor to a very large and wealthy family; a successor who also happened to flee his wedding, a drama of all sorts ensues. The story of a couple who disguise themselves as an assistant cook and his wife.

trailers.title: คำนั้นฉันพูดจริง (OST. ดอกอ้อ สายขวัญ) : Nutty [Official MV]
